category_sources: Official libadwaita API docs describe Adw as building blocks for modern GNOME applications.
source_facts.description says it provides building blocks for modern adaptive GNOME applications.
display_name_sources: Official docs identify the project source and website as libadwaita/Adwaita.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages documentation index and gi-docgen API reference for libadwaita.
repo_sources: Official GNOME libadwaita API docs list Source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libadwaita/.
tags_sources: Official API docs list Gtk as a dependency and document a C header and pkg-config package.
source_facts.description identifies modern adaptive GNOME application building blocks.
